calendar.matters:
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-08-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Elan Wick, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not reported. (611)

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff Scott Redmond appearing In Propria Persona.
Defendant Sheryll Casuga appearing In Propria Persona.

This matter comes on calendar for trial having been transferred to this department due to the recusal of Commissioner Slavit.

Parties waive presenting opening statements. Both litigants are sworn and give testimony to the court.

The plaintiff submits the following exhibits to the court;
1 - Copies of Plaintiff's Complaint and Medical Records

The defendant submits the following exhibits to the court;
A - E-mail from M. Derheim, dated 8/19/07
B - Defendant's NASM Certificate #1335876
C - Defendant's University of the Phillipines Diploma, dated 4/27/03
D - E-mail from S. Redmond to S. Casuga, dated 8/19/08

After hearing all argument from the parties, the matter is taken under submission by the court.

12/4/08 - JUDGMENT REACHED, 12/8/08 - JUDGMENT FILED AND ENTERED

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-03-2008 Continued To Dec-03-08 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 611

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-15-2008 Continued To Dec-03-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 506
